'''鈭歷-v-v-sh''' ('''kavaveshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacillate|vacillate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-v-v-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacillate|vacillate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-v-v-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kavaveshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivaveshoko|thivaveshoko]] || [[word:jivaveshoko|jivaveshoko]] || [[word:shivaveshoko|shivaveshoko]] || [[word:kivaveshoko|kivaveshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvaveshoko|thuthuvaveshoko]] || [[word:jujuvaveshoko|jujuvaveshoko]] || [[word:shushuvaveshoko|shushuvaveshoko]] || [[word:kukuvaveshoko|kukuvaveshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvaveshoko|thuvaveshoko]] || [[word:juvaveshoko|juvaveshoko]] || [[word:shuvaveshoko|shuvaveshoko]] || [[word:kuvaveshoko|kuvaveshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvaveshoko|thuvaveshoko]] || [[word:juvaveshoko|juvaveshoko]] || [[word:shuvaveshoko|shuvaveshoko]] || [[word:kuvaveshoko|kuvaveshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevaveshoko|thevaveshoko]] || [[word:jevaveshoko|jevaveshoko]] || [[word:shevaveshoko|shevaveshoko]] || [[word:kevaveshoko|kevaveshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovaveshoko|thothovaveshoko]] || [[word:jojovaveshoko|jojovaveshoko]] || [[word:shoshovaveshoko|shoshovaveshoko]] || [[word:kokovaveshoko|kokovaveshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovaveshoko|thovaveshoko]] || [[word:jovaveshoko|jovaveshoko]] || [[word:shovaveshoko|shovaveshoko]] || [[word:kovaveshoko|kovaveshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovaveshoko|thovaveshoko]] || [[word:jovaveshoko|jovaveshoko]] || [[word:shovaveshoko|shovaveshoko]] || [[word:kovaveshoko|kovaveshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙vaveshoko|th忙vaveshoko]] || [[word:j忙vaveshoko|j忙vaveshoko]] || [[word:sh忙vaveshoko|sh忙vaveshoko]] || [[word:k忙vaveshoko|k忙vaveshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavaveshoko|thathavaveshoko]] || [[word:jajavaveshoko|jajavaveshoko]] || [[word:shashavaveshoko|shashavaveshoko]] || [[word:kakavaveshoko|kakavaveshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavaveshoko|thavaveshoko]] || [[word:javaveshoko|javaveshoko]] || [[word:shavaveshoko|shavaveshoko]] || [[word:kavaveshoko|kavaveshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavaveshoko|thavaveshoko]] || [[word:javaveshoko|javaveshoko]] || [[word:shavaveshoko|shavaveshoko]] || [[word:kavaveshoko|kavaveshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavaveshithi|shavaveshithi]] || [[word:shavaveshiji|shavaveshiji]] || [[word:shavaveshishi|shavaveshishi]] || [[word:shavaveshiki|shavaveshiki]]

|-
